### Where does the guide stop being from-scratch?

A one-line case: "Section 4 imports langchain.chains.RetrievalQA and uses it

### Suggested action

- [ ] Remove the guide entirely
- [ ] Move to `see_also` (acceptable as adjacent reading, not as a primary entry)
- [ ] Keep but rewrite `from_scratch_evidence`
